ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_partitions" (
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition entry */,
  "k" INTEGER /* K-value defining partition characteristics */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the data complexity */,
  "num_k_partitions" INTEGER /* Number of partitions required for the given k-value */,
  "num_k_partitions_lb" INTEGER /* Lower bound on the number of partitions */,
  "num_k_partitions_ub" INTEGER /* Upper bound on the number of partitions */,
  "partition_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the partition */,
  "partition_type" TEXT /* Type of partitioning strategy */,
  "partition_status" TEXT /* Status of the partition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partition was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the partition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the partition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_partitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_partitions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the partition level */,
  "level_value" INTEGER /* Value representing the complexity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complexity level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complexity level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complexity level was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the complexity level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the complexity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_levels_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partition entry associated with this metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_metrics_partition_id FOREIGN KEY ("partition_id") REFERENCES data_partitions ("partition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history record */,
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partition entry related to this history */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_history_partition_id FOREIGN KEY ("partition_id") REFERENCES data_partitions ("partition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
